search_query: how to start a YouTube channel
retrieved_result: How long do YOU feel strange after a seizure? "How long do YOU feel strange after a seizure? Topic: Living With Epilepsy - Adults I figured I would share my situation and how I am feeling with people who hopefully can relate, because I am a bit scared currently. I had my first seizure some 8 years ago and have been dealing with them ever since."
Decision_Reason: The retrieved result discusses epilepsy and personal health experiences, not content about starting or creating a YouTube channel.
